heroHeadline: US Military Destroys Own $100M Aircraft to Prevent Capture After Pilot Rescue in Iran Theater
heroSubtitle: Pentagon confirms deliberate destruction of downed aircraft as Iran formally rejects Trump's Hormuz deadline, deepening the conflict standoff on Day 37.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
